ลูกตั้งไฟเบอร์ซีเมนต์ หนา 1" -- fiber-cement riser board, 1 inch thick

warnings: Fourth and final view on this page; siblings are the full stair section (_view1_st3_section.json), railing detail (_view2_st3_railing_detail.json), and handrail bracket detail (_view3_st3_handrail_bracket_detail.json).

Identical fiber-cement tread/riser finish spec to house #4's equivalent detail -- confirms this is a repeated design-office standard for this house series' main interior stair, applied over the RC structural stair slab (S-11/S-12).
